complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.模板匹配：无需加载模型，将实时图像与各产品的参考图比对，选最相似的: Template matching: no model is loaded; the live image is compared against each product's reference image and the most similar one is chosen
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.产品有独特印刷 / 丝印图案、但无可读文字、且不希望加载模型: Products with a distinctive printed / silkscreen pattern but no readable text, where loading a model is undesirable

complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**私有** 分区底部提供 **私有库导出** 与 **导入私有库** 按钮，用: At the bottom of the **Private** section, the **Export private library** and **Import private library** buttons let you back up or migrate the entire private template library between AOI machines.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**导出私有库** — 点击 **私有库导出**，系统将全部私有模板打包为一个: **Export the private library** — click **Export private library**, and the system packages all private templates into a single ``.zip`` file for download. The package carries not only the template records but also the custom-classifier model files the templates reference and their trainable color / depth maps, so the library can be restored in full on another machine with its classifier models still loadable.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**导入私有库** — 点击 **导入私有库**，选择一个 ``.zip`` 包: **Import the private library** — click **Import private library** and select a ``.zip`` package (the old ``.csv`` files are no longer supported). Before importing, the system previews any conflicts between the package and the existing library:
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.若无冲突，直接导入。: If there are no conflicts, it imports directly.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.若存在冲突，弹出 **发现现有模板** 对话框，提示本包中有多少模板已存在于库中: If conflicts exist, an **Existing Templates Found** dialog appears, indicating how many templates in the package already exist in the library and offering two ways to proceed:
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**跳过现有模板** — 仅导入新模板，保留库中已有模板。: **Skip existing** — import only the new templates and keep the existing ones.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.**覆盖现有模板** — 用包中模板替换按料号匹配的现有模板。: **Overwrite existing** — replace existing templates matched by part number with the ones from the package.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.仅按封装匹配的模板和内置模板始终保留，不会被覆盖。: Templates matched only by package number, and built-in templates, are always kept and never overwritten.
complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.导入完成后，系统以提示消息汇总结果，例如\"导入完成 — 新增 X 个，覆盖 Y: When the import finishes, a message summarizes the result, for example "Import complete — X added, Y overwritten, Z skipped".
